name: Ria Money Transfer - Los Altos Ranch Market
description_short: Ria Money Transfer operates a global money transfer service with 600,000+ agent locations in 190+ countries, offering multiple send and receive methods including online, mobile, in-person, and WhatsApp transfers.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer is an established international remittance provider with over 35 years of operating history in the money transfer industry. The company has processed over one billion transfers globally and maintains an extensive network of agent locations across Africa, Asia, Europe, Latin America, North America, and Oceania. Their platform serves customers who need to send funds to family and friends across international borders with various payout options.

Ria offers multiple channels for sending money: online via website, mobile app, in-person at physical locations, and via WhatsApp integration. Recipients can receive funds through bank deposits, cash pickup at agent locations (600,000+ worldwide), digital wallets, home delivery, and ATM withdrawals. The service supports transfers to over 190 countries and territories with access to 100+ currencies. Their first-transfer promotional rates and real-time transfer tracking are standard offerings.

The company differentiates itself through its extensive agent network (claimed at 600,000+ locations), multi-channel sending options including WhatsApp, 35+ years of established operations, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee. They maintain relatively high app ratings (4.9 stars on iOS, 4.5 on Trustpilot) and actively market their service including sponsorship of the Mexican National Team. The emphasis on convenience across multiple platforms appeals to digitally-native and traditional users alike.

However, specific fee structures beyond the promotional 1.99 USD first-transfer rate are not clearly disclosed on the website, making it difficult to assess true cost competitiveness for repeat transfers. Exchange rate markups and recipient country-specific pricing remain opaque. While the company emphasizes speed and safety, no specific delivery time guarantees are provided beyond promotional examples (e.g., "by 10:39 PM"). The breadth of services masks the lack of transparent pricing details that consumers need for informed comparison.
pros: Extensive agent network with 600,000+ locations in 190+ countries enables cash pickup convenience worldwide
Multiple send methods including online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp provide flexibility for different user preferences
Supports 100+ currencies for broader global coverage compared to narrower remittance providers
35+ years of operational history demonstrates longevity and market establishment
High customer ratings (4.9 stars iOS, 4.5 Trustpilot) indicate consistent positive user experience
Real-time transfer tracking allows senders to monitor delivery status
100% satisfaction guarantee provides consumer protection assurance
cons: Exchange rate markups and true fees for non-promotional transfers are not transparently disclosed on website
Delivery time guarantees are vague; promotional examples shown but no standard service levels stated
Comparison tool limited to Mexico on homepage, making rate shopping for other corridors unclear
No clear pricing for different delivery methods (bank deposit vs. cash pickup vs. digital wallet)
Customer service contact information not readily visible on homepage for immediate support questions
best_for: International migrant workers sending regular remittances to family in developing countries
Customers who value multiple send/receive options and need flexibility (online, mobile, in-person, WhatsApp)
Senders prioritizing extensive cash pickup networks over lowest fees for emerging market recipients
Users established in digital platforms seeking seamless mobile-first transfer experience
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best suited for international remitters who prioritize network reach and convenience over transparent, competitive pricing. The critical caveat is that while the company emphasizes speed and extensive locations, actual costs beyond promotional first-transfer rates and delivery time guarantees remain poorly disclosed, making it essential for prospective users to request specific quotes before committing to transfers.
services: Online money transfer via website with real-time rate quotes
Mobile app-based money transfers with faster repeat transfer capability
In-person cash payment at physical agent locations
WhatsApp-integrated money transfers to select countries
Bank deposit delivery to recipient accounts
Cash pickup at 600,000+ agent locations worldwide
Home delivery service to recipient locations
IBAN calculator for international account identification
Transfer tracking with real-time delivery status updates
